title: Device Bridge production readiness and server operations handbook
purpose: Bundle a safe Device Bridge production-readiness projection with a server operations handbook that keeps Dermatolog Pro deployable as one self-hosted product.

includedStages.title: Device Bridge production readiness endpoint
includedStages.outcome: Expose a system-admin backend endpoint that aggregates safe worker telemetry, hardening, recovery, audit and export metadata.

includedStages.title: Device Bridge production readiness UI
includedStages.outcome: Show safe readiness gates in the system devices page without raw worker payloads, tokens, patient names or storage paths.

includedStages.title: Device Bridge hardening guard
includedStages.outcome: Lock the backend, frontend, OpenAPI, workflow, docs and project-memory markers behind a deterministic preflight.

includedStages.title: Server operations handbook manifest
includedStages.outcome: Capture local operating commands, incident boundaries and verification gates in a repository-bundled manifest.

includedStages.title: Server operations handbook renderer
includedStages.outcome: Render the manifest to a safe markdown handoff for operators without including live secrets or external service dependencies.

includedStages.title: Operations handbook drift guard
includedStages.outcome: Verify handbook files, scripts, docs, workflow and project-memory markers before future development continues.

sections.title: Daily readiness
checks: Open /sys/devices as system_admin and review Device Bridge production readiness.
Open /sys/self-hosted-ops and confirm product readiness has managedRuntime/database set to none.
Run npm run preflight:stage8j-8o before merging Device Bridge or operations changes.

sections.title: Device Bridge incidents
checks: Use backend audit/recovery/replay endpoints instead of direct database edits for command lifecycle recovery.
Do not expose raw worker payloads, result payloads, storage paths, tokens or patient names in operator-facing reports.
Treat stale workers, failed commands and stuck commands as readiness gates requiring operator review.

sections.title: Deployment boundary
checks: Deploy frontend, backend, PostgreSQL, nginx and local object storage together from deploy/self-hosted.
Do not introduce Supabase, managed databases, browser hardware APIs or external worker runtimes as required production dependencies.
External CRM/ad inputs must remain inbound/imported data, never a runtime dependency for the clinical product.

lovableSyncVerification.expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: Stage 8J-8O synced from main, no conflicts.
